text:
What some fail to understand is that 
@Portalcoin
 is not just a one or two day fad

It already has a chokehold on some of the most influential people in the space, and many seem to love it

Metrics say that you’ll have to bear with the $PORTAL for longer than you’d expect
“In my client’s defense, your honor, he was simply learning how to build”

You guys seriously don’t get how cooked the economy is 

Trying to go on a trip with like 15 college friends - it’s about $200 per person for the weekend

Only THREE of them can afford it. THREE. The youth is living off their parents and it’s a house of cards waiting to topple
